VISITHARAR
Harari Tourism Commission

Something
Extraordinary is Coming
to Harar.

VisitHarar is being carefully crafted into the official digital home of Harari tourism — a place to discover heritage, culture, experiences, and the living streets of Jugol, all in one beautiful platform.

Launching Soon Scroll
The Living Museum · The City of Peace
What's Coming

A platform built for the walled city, its people, and everyone it welcomes.

Discover

Discover Harar

The history, culture, and heritage of one of Africa's most remarkable living cities, told from the inside.

Attractions

Gates, coffee houses, markets, mosques, and the hidden corners within the walls.

Authentic Moments

Harari Run Day

Thank you for running with us today.

We are honored to welcome you as one of the very first visitors to VisitHarar. The journey is just beginning, and we look forward to helping you discover the Living Museum and the City of Peace.

You are one of the first to see this page — before its official launch.
